title: centaurea × flavo-rosea
intro: Centaurea × flavo-rosea, a hybrid species of the Centaurea genus, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is also known as the sulphur cornflower due to its vibrant yellow and blue colors. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Centaurea × flavo-rosea is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures that are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system.
